sweeps.summary: Two fresh 2026-06-09 Dubai-property reads emerge as the dominant net-new signal in the 72h window: AGBI's Shruthi Nair surfaces the first hard 'buyer's-edge' read of the cooling — up to 20% off ask in some pockets, 5% Bayut+dubizzle listing-price decline, 35% secondary-market deal drop, JLL-cited 11% YoY March transaction fall, 80K+ 2026 handovers, LTV revised 70:30→80:20 — quoted across Bayut/Dubizzle, Pride and Property, Palladium, Merlin and Aarna brokers; The National's Mario Volpi anchors the macro frame with S&P UAE PMI prints (52.9 Mar / 52.6 May / 55.0 Feb) and argues slower launch cadence is responsible developer behavior, not danger. Empty-sweep guard held — Villa Gaia / Dh280M follow-up (Gulf News 08-Jun) confirmed as a re-report of the existing May-25 entry; DWTC AED 25B 2025 economic-output release (June 9) skipped as MICE-retrospective rather than a current property opportunity.
